originalTitle: New US ambassador to South Africa summoned over 'undiplomatic remarks'
title: New US ambassador to South Africa summoned over 'undiplomatic remarks'
content: Leo Brent Bozell apologises after weighing in on a dispute rooted in the country's apartheid past.

originalTitle: Mugabe's son drops bail request - what has happened to the family after losing power
title: Mugabe's son drops bail request - what has happened to the family after losing power
content: Bellarmine Mugabe will negotiate a plea deal after being accused of attempted murder and other charges in South Africa.

originalTitle: French aid worker among three killed in drone strikes in rebel-held DR Congo city
title: French aid worker among three killed in drone strikes in rebel-held DR Congo city
content: Witnesses say drone strikes hit a residential building frequently occupied by expatriates and aid workers in Goma.

originalTitle: Trump: ‘I don’t know’ about report US at fault in school strike
title: Trump: ‘I don’t know’ about report US at fault in school strike
content: Donald Trump denied knowledge of a military investigation finding the US responsible for the Minab girls' school strike.

originalTitle: South Africa summons new US ambassador over ‘undiplomatic remarks’
title: South Africa summons new US ambassador over ‘undiplomatic remarks’
content: US President Trump has claimed South Africa is engaged in a campaign of white persecution, which Pretoria denies.

originalTitle: Iran-linked hackers hit medical giant Stryker in retaliatory cyberattack
title: Iran-linked hackers hit medical giant Stryker in retaliatory cyberattack
content: Group claims to have seized 50 terabytes of data in response to deadly US-Israeli strikes on Iranian school.

originalTitle: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
title: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
content: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.

originalTitle: Countries agree to record release of emergency oil reserves as prices surge
title: Countries agree to record release of emergency oil reserves as prices surge
content: The G7 group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

originalTitle: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
title: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
content: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.

originalTitle: Arsenal undone by own set-piece weapon as 100% record ends in Germany
title: Arsenal undone by own set-piece weapon as 100% record ends in Germany
content: "You do it too, eh?". Those were the words from Arsenal's set-piece coach Nicolas Jover to Bayer Leverkusen manager Kasper Hjulmand after the German side scored from a corner in the 1-1 Champions League last-16 first-leg draw between the two sides.

originalTitle: Valverde's brilliant first-half hat-trick stuns Man City
title: Valverde's brilliant first-half hat-trick stuns Man City
content: Real Madrid's Federico Valverde scores a first-half hat-trick as the Spanish giants beat Manchester City 3-0 in their Champions League last-16 encounter at the Bernabeu.

originalTitle: 'It's not what we expected' - Guardiola admits Real too good for City
title: 'It's not what we expected' - Guardiola admits Real too good for City
content: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says his side "will try" but acknowledges they are going to struggle to produce a second leg comeback against Real Madrid, after losing 3-0 in the first leg of their last-16 tie in the Champions League.
